title: thelypteris riparia
intro: Thelypteris riparia, also known as the river fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris riparia include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Thelypteris riparia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
